summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: Nothing's flagging today — your knees and joints, your shoulders and neck, the lower body, all quiet, no soreness lining up to slow you down. You're someone who recovers by stacking steady days rather than chasing big swings, and last night fit that mold cleanly: you slept enough, your system settled, and you came into today calm and ready.

Performance: Train normally. You're rested and your reserves are full, but you've only put in a light effort so far, so there's a real session left in you — make it resistance work, not just more steps, and that's where today actually pays off. One nudge: you're close on protein with a little gap to close, and you've left a big chunk of the day's food on the table, so don't let the deficit run away from you tonight — eat enough to protect the muscle you're trying to build.

Transit: none
